full_text:
Hu Fen (Xuanwei) 胡奮 (玄威)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Fen (胡奮), styledXuanwei (玄威), was born in Linjin in Anding. Killed Zhuge Dan of Wu. Advised Du Yu to wait before attacking Jianye. Hu Fen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Hu Fen lived during the Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
